reasoning: The primary W1 trend for EURUSD is bearish. The market has been in a multi-day bullish pullback which appears to have culminated in a liquidity sweep above the H1 swing high of 1.18487 during the New York session. This was followed by an aggressive sell-off, resulting in a confirmed bearish Change of Character (CHoCH) on the M15 timeframe at 19:00 UTC, breaking the 1.17844 low. This LTF structural shift signals a potential realignment with the HTF bearish order flow. The chosen setup is a high-quality M1 SMS+BMS+RTO_BEARISH pattern, which refines the entry to a fresh M1 Bearish Order Block at [1.17978, 1.18001]. This entry anticipates a pullback (Return To Origin) into the source of the structural break. The setup has a confluence score of 9/10, earning an A+ grade, and offers an excellent R:R of over 5:1 targeting downside liquidity pools at M15 and H4 swing lows. The trade is invalidated if price breaks above the M1 high at 1.18001.
